name: Collins Beach Suites
description: Oceanfront suites on Collins Ave with private balconies and morning yoga on the sand.

name: SoBe Art House
description: Pastel art-deco rooms steps from Lincoln Road shops, cafés, and ocean breezes.

name: Harborview Downtown
description: Floor-to-ceiling windows over Elliott Bay, walking distance to Pike Place Market.

name: Alpine Lodge
description: Timber-and-stone retreat with ski-in/ski-out access and a 24/7 cocoa bar.

name: Gramercy Loft
description: Industrial loft with exposed brick, a block from Gramercy Park.

name: Mission Courtyard
description: Sun-soaked courtyard hotel in the Mission with rooftop tacos and live music.

name: Lakeside Retreat
description: A-frame cabins on the water with kayaks at the dock and a fire pit under the stars.

name: Garden District
description: Wrought-iron balconies, magnolia courtyards, and beignets on the corner.

name: Covent Garden Townhouse
description: Georgian townhouse a minute from theatreland — afternoon tea served in the parlour at four.

name: Shoreditch Loft Hotel
description: Brick-and-steel loft rooms over an East London cocktail bar; vinyl in every suite.

name: Notting Hill Garden Rooms
description: Pastel facade, private walled garden, and the Portobello Market on your doorstep on Saturdays.

name: Thames View Riverside
description: Floor-to-ceiling views of the Thames and Tower Bridge, with a rooftop bar at golden hour.

name: Kensington Mews House
description: Charming mews house steps from Hyde Park — log fire in the snug, scones at breakfast.

name: Hôtel Bourg Tibourg - Paris Marais
description: Four-star Le Marais boutique. 19 Rue du Bourg Tibourg — hidden Marais courtyards, falafel queues, and lantern-lit lanes. Bar, breakfast, concierge.

name: Beauquartier - Marais Bourg Tibourg
description: Modern apartment-style stay in upper Marais. Kitchen, concierge, vintage galleries and natural-wine bars on the doorstep.

name: Hôtel Mercure Paris Notre-Dame Saint-Germain-des-Prés
description: Four-star Latin Quarter Mercure with fitness center, bar, and parking. Sorbonne backstreets and Shakespeare & Co. nearby.

name: Hôtel Ducs de Bourgogne
description: Four-star stay by Pont Neuf in Louvre / Les Halles. Steps from the Tuileries, Seine river walks, and Châtelet metro.

name: Le Presbytère
description: Boutique Marais hideaway with breakfast buffet and concierge. Magnolia-lined Rue de la Verrerie, minutes from the Pompidou.

name: Hôtel Saint-Louis en l'Isle - Notre-Dame
description: On the island in the Seine, steps from Notre-Dame and Berthillon ice-cream. Breakfast, concierge, riverside walks.

name: Hôtel Notre-Dame Saint Michel
description: Boutique 3-star on Quai Saint-Michel with bar and breakfast. The Seine and Notre-Dame literally across the street.

name: Hôtel Pilgrim - Quartier Latin
description: Four-star Latin Quarter design hotel with pool, fitness center, and bar. Sorbonne and Shakespeare & Co. on foot.

name: Hôtel Europe Saint-Séverin
description: Latin Quarter boutique on Rue Saint-Séverin with bar, breakfast, and concierge. Bookshops and tiny bistros all around.

name: Hôtel du Mont Blanc Paris
description: Cozy budget pick on Rue de la Huchette. Restaurant, breakfast, elevator. Loud and lovely Latin Quarter at your doorstep.

name: Hôtel du Jeu de Paume
description: Four-star jewel on Île Saint-Louis, set inside a 17th-century real tennis court. Restaurant, breakfast, concierge.

name: Quartier Libre Marais
description: Four-star upper Marais boutique near République. Fitness center, breakfast, concierge. Quiet streets meet buzzy nightlife.

name: Beauquartier - Marais Vertus
description: Apartment-style stay on quiet Rue des Vertus in the upper Marais. Kitchen and concierge — a base for slow Paris days.

name: Hôtel Parc Saint-Séverin
description: Four-star Latin Quarter hotel from Esprit de France. Bar, breakfast, turndown service. A literary corner of Paris.

name: Hôtel & Spa Saint-Jacques
description: Latin Quarter four-star with spa and bar. Period-style rooms, concierge, and the Sorbonne a short stroll away.

name: Hôtel WYLD Saint Germain
description: Three-star on Rue des Écoles with parking, breakfast buffet, and baggage storage. Smart base for Left Bank wandering.

name: Hôtel Relais des Halles Paris
description: Four-star above the Les Halles forum. Parking, bar, breakfast — and the most central metro hub in Paris.

name: Roi de Sicile - Rivoli
description: Four-star apartment-style suites on Rue de Rivoli — kitchen, restaurant, kid-friendly. Heart-of-Marais postcard views.

name: Andréa Hotel - Paris Marais
description: Boutique 3-star on Rue Saint-Bon, central Marais. Restaurant and breakfast — a quiet street, walking everywhere.

name: Hôtel Claude Bernard Saint-Germain
description: Boutique 3-star on Rue des Écoles. Restaurant, breakfast buffet, smoke-free rooms. Easy walk to the Panthéon.

name: Une Autre Chambre
description: Four-star hideaway in the upper Marais on Rue Bailly. Bar, breakfast, concierge — quiet street, wildly central.

name: Hôtel Le Clos Notre-Dame
description: Saint-Germain three-star on tiny Rue de l'Hirondelle. Breakfast, concierge, elevator. A discreet base for Left Bank life.

name: WS Hôtel de Ville - Musée Pompidou
description: Self check-in apartment-style stay on Rue Pernelle. Kitchen and shuttle. Pompidou and BHV department store next door.

name: Le Globe
description: Charming Sentier hotel on Rue Saint-Denis. Restaurant, bar, concierge. Markets, coffee bars, and the Opéra a short walk.

name: Hôtel Victoires Opéra
description: Four-star on bustling Rue Montorgueil. Restaurant, breakfast, laundry. Café terraces and Opéra Garnier minutes away.

name: Hôtel Korner Sorbonne
description: Three-star on Rue Saint-Jacques in the Latin Quarter. Breakfast, concierge, elevator. Sorbonne lecture halls right outside.

name: Temple de Jeanne
description: Boutique three-star on Rue Saint-Antoine. Breakfast, concierge, elevator. Marais market mornings at the doorstep.

name: Hôtel Royal Saint-Michel
description: Four-star on Boulevard Saint-Michel. Restaurant, breakfast buffet, shuttle. Jardin du Luxembourg seven minutes on foot.

name: Hôtel Esmeralda
description: Eccentric, dirt-cheap Latin Quarter classic on Rue Saint-Julien le Pauvre. Restaurant downstairs, view of Notre-Dame upstairs.

name: Hôtel Le Grand Mazarin
description: Five-star Maison Pariente jewel on Rue de la Verrerie. Pool, restaurant, bar, fitness center. Pure Marais opulence.

name: Hôtel de la Bretonnerie
description: Three-star Marais classic on Rue Sainte-Croix. Bar, breakfast buffet, smoke-free. The deep-Marais, gallery-and-café version.

name: Hôtel du Levant Paris
description: Three-star on Rue de la Harpe in the Latin Quarter. Restaurant, breakfast, concierge. A loud, lively, lovable corner.

name: Elixir Hotel - Paris Centre
description: Three-star on Rue Jean Lantier near Châtelet. Restaurant, breakfast, shuttle. As central as Paris gets without paying five-star.

name: Novotel Paris Les Halles
description: Big-brand four-star at Place Marguerite de Navarre. Restaurant, fitness center, bar, parking. Family-friendly Accor reliability.

name: Les Bulles de Paris
description: Four-star Latin Quarter design hotel with restaurant, spa, breakfast buffet, and laundry. Modern, calm, smartly central.

name: Hôtel Jardin de Cluny
description: Four-star on Rue du Sommerard, opposite the Cluny Museum. Restaurant, breakfast buffet, smoke-free rooms.

name: Hôtel Henri IV Rive Gauche
description: Three-star on Rue Saint-Jacques. Restaurant, breakfast, shuttle. Smoke-free rooms a few minutes from Notre-Dame.

name: Hôtel des Ducs d'Anjou
description: Four-star on Rue Sainte-Opportune. Restaurant, breakfast, laundry. Steps from Châtelet and the river.

name: Hôtel Abbatial Saint-Germain
description: Three-star on Boulevard Saint-Germain. Restaurant, breakfast, shuttle. Cafés, bookstores, and the Seine within blocks.

name: Hotel du Vieux Marais
description: Three-star on Rue du Plâtre. Breakfast and shuttle. A quiet, mid-budget Marais base for first-time Paris.

name: Hôtel Les Jardins de Montmartre - Paris 18e
description: Boutique Montmartre / 18e stay. Sacré-Cœur views, cobbled lanes, painter ateliers. Expect breakfast, concierge, elevator.

name: Timhotel Montmartre
description: Boutique Montmartre / 18e stay. Sacré-Cœur views, cobbled lanes, painter ateliers. Expect breakfast buffet, concierge, elevator.

name: Hôtel Eden Montmartre
description: Boutique Montmartre / 18e stay. Sacré-Cœur views, cobbled lanes, painter ateliers. Expect restaurant, parking, concierge.

name: Hôtel de Clermont
description: Charming Montmartre / 18e stay. Sacré-Cœur views, cobbled lanes, painter ateliers. Expect bar, breakfast, smoke-free.

name: ibis Styles Paris Montmartre Nord
description: Boutique Montmartre / 18e stay. Sacré-Cœur views, cobbled lanes, painter ateliers. Expect parking, breakfast, elevator.

name: Appart'hôtel Odalys City Paris Montmartre
description: Four-star Montmartre / 18e stay. Sacré-Cœur views, cobbled lanes, painter ateliers. Expect restaurant, parking, elevator.

name: Montmartre Résidence
description: Charming Montmartre / 18e stay. Sacré-Cœur views, cobbled lanes, painter ateliers. Expect parking, breakfast, concierge.

name: Hôtel Avenir Montmartre
description: Cozy Opéra / Pigalle stay. Galeries Lafayette, Opéra Garnier, lively Pigalle. Expect restaurant, breakfast, smoke-free.

name: Hôtel Apolonia Paris Montmartre, Sure by BW
description: Boutique Montmartre / 18e stay. Sacré-Cœur views, cobbled lanes, painter ateliers. Expect parking, breakfast, concierge.

name: Aparthotel Adagio Paris Montmartre
description: Four-star Montmartre / 18e stay. Sacré-Cœur views, cobbled lanes, painter ateliers. Expect fitness center, parking, breakfast.

name: Hôtel des Arts Montmartre
description: Four-star Montmartre / 18e stay. Sacré-Cœur views, cobbled lanes, painter ateliers. Expect fitness center, parking, bar.

name: Hôtel Élysée Montmartre
description: Four-star Montmartre / 18e stay. Sacré-Cœur views, cobbled lanes, painter ateliers. Expect concierge, breakfast, elevator.

name: Hotel Arc Elysées - Paris
description: Boutique Champs-Élysées / Madeleine stay. Triangle d'Or boutiques and the Champs at your door. Expect breakfast, concierge, elevator.

name: Hôtel Claridge
description: Four-star Champs-Élysées / Madeleine stay. Triangle d'Or boutiques and the Champs at your door. Expect restaurant, breakfast, laundry.

name: InterContinental Paris - Champs-Elysées Etoile
description: Five-star Champs-Élysées / Madeleine stay. Triangle d'Or boutiques and the Champs at your door. Expect restaurant, fitness center, bar.

description: Four-star Champs-Élysées / Madeleine stay. Triangle d'Or boutiques and the Champs at your door. Expect bar, breakfast, concierge.

name: Hôtel Marceau Champs Elysées
description: Boutique Trocadéro / 16e stay. Tower views from Trocadéro and Bois de Boulogne nearby. Expect breakfast buffet, concierge, elevator.

name: Hôtel Plaza Elysées
description: Four-star Champs-Élysées / Madeleine stay. Triangle d'Or boutiques and the Champs at your door. Expect restaurant, breakfast, laundry.
